creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kristof Provost from comment #3)

Patch applies cleanly to 13.1-BETA2 and seems to work, ifconfig emits this error instead (which I assume is the intended outcome):

    ifconfig: SIOCSIFVNET: Operation not supported by device
    jail: /sbin/ifconfig epair0b vnet myjail: failed
